variants.title: Filtrec A210T60BM Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A210T60BM. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A210T60BM provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 60µ, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 148.0 mm, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Bypass Pressure: 1.7 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 12 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 60µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.7 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
